# Igneous Petrology

**Summary**: The study of the origin, composition, and occurrence of igneous rocks.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] investigated the igneous petrology of mantle xenoliths.

## Key Subtopics

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] ['partial melting, thermobarometry, mineral chemistry']

## Methods and Approaches Used

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] ['EPMA, ICP-MS, Petrography']

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Determined melting degrees (1-17%) and oxidation states (-1.89 to -0.22 FMQ). ([[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023, p. 22]])

## Competing Approaches and Debates

- [[2023-iskandar|Iskandar, 2023]] Determining melting history and oxidation state in the Arabian plate.
